Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-001 – Woolworths SA R285,400
Description: Verified trade invoice issued to Woolworths South Africa for garment supply – denim jackets and formal shirts. Net 30 days. SARS-registered. Eligible for SEDA invoice discounting.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-002 – Pick n Pay SA R192,750
Description: Verified trade invoice to Pick n Pay SA for packaged food items – biscuits and snack packs. CIPC-registered SME. Net 45 days.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-003 – Spar Group R341,200
Description: Tokenised invoice for Spar Group private-label cleaning products supply. 6-month supply agreement. Net 30 days. SEDA-supported SME.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-004 – Transnet Freight Rail R88,500
Description: Invoice for safety signage and reflective gear supplied to Transnet Freight Rail – Johannesburg Depot. ISO 9001 quality cert. Net 30.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-005 – City of Johannesburg R215,000
Description: Municipal procurement invoice for PPE supply – gloves, high-visibility vests, and hard hats for Joburg City Parks staff. Government SCM approved.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-006 – Massmart Holdings R127,850
Description: Invoice for branded reusable shopping bags supplied to Massmart (Game Stores). Eco-certified material. Net 30.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-007 – Shoprite Checkers R394,600
Description: Supply of 3,200 units of private-label household detergents. Approved supplier on Shoprite vendor list. Net 45.
LockedReason: Invoice discounted as collateral with ABSA Business Bank – Ref ABSA-INV-DISC-00778

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-008 – Eskom Holdings R156,000
Description: Supply of industrial cleaning materials to Eskom Hendrina Power Station – planned maintenance shutdown. BBBEE Level 2 compliant. Net 30.

Name: GMSH Factory Floor – 2,400 m² Leasehold Improvement
Description: Tokenised leasehold improvement asset: 2,400 m² factory floor in Germiston Industrial Park. Fit-out includes production lines, quality control bay, and cold storage annex. CIPC-registered.

Name: GMSH Brand Goodwill – SABS Mark Licensed Brand
Description: Tokenised brand goodwill asset for SABS-licensed 'EcoShield' product range. Active SABS mark licence No. SM-3845. Annual royalty income R420,000.

Name: GMSH Government Supplier Registration – CSD Vendor
Description: Central Supplier Database registration asset for GMSH. BBBEE Level 2, Tax Clearance Valid, CSD Ref No. MAAA0012345678. Enables national government procurement participation.

Name: GMSH Industrial Sewing Machine Fleet – 24× Juki DDL-9000C
Description: Fleet of 24 Juki DDL-9000C industrial lockstitch sewing machines. Purchased 2023. Serial range: JUKI-DDL9-4501 to 4524. Current replacement value R1.68M. SEDA asset-backed financing eligible.
LockedReason: Collateral for SEFA equipment loan – Ref SEFA-EQP-00124

Name: GMSH Automated Packaging Line – Bosch Hüller Model PL-800
Description: Automated packaging and labelling line: Bosch Hüller PL-800, 120 units/min throughput. Installed 2024. Serial: BH-PL800-GA-00178. Valued at R3.2M.

Name: GMSH Injection Moulding Machine – Engel ES 330/65
Description: Engel ES 330/65 HL injection moulding machine for plastic components. 65-ton clamping force. Serial: ENGEL-ES-GTA-00456. Purchased 2022. Insurance value R890,000.

Name: GMSH Solar Power Installation – 120 kWp Rooftop PV System
Description: 120 kWp rooftop solar PV system (320× 375W Ja Solar panels + 2× SMA Tripower 60kW inverters). Installed by SANERI-accredited contractor. NRS 097 compliant. Net Metering agreement with City Power Joburg.

Name: GMSH Delivery Fleet – 3× Isuzu NQR 500 Truck
Description: Fleet of 3 Isuzu NQR 500 4-ton trucks (2023 models). Reg: GP-12-GMSH-01/02/03. RTMS-certified operator. Last service date: 2025-01-10. Insurance value R2.1M.

Name: GMSH SETA Skills Programme – Apparel Manufacturing NQF Level 3 (Cohort 2024-A)
Description: SETA-accredited skills programme completion: 40 learners certified in Apparel Manufacturing NQF Level 3 (SAQA ID 59097). Facilitated by Fibre Processing & Manufacturing SETA (FP&M SETA). Provider: Ekurhuleni West TVET College. 6-month programme.

Name: GMSH dti Enterprise Development Programme – Cohort 2024
Description: Enterprise development programme certificate – 8 GMSH staff completed DTIC (Dept. of Trade, Industry & Competition) supplier development programme. Focus: financial management, export readiness, and BBBEE compliance.

Name: GMSH SEDA Business Incubator Graduation Certificate
Description: SEDA (Small Enterprise Development Agency) 18-month business incubation programme graduation certificate for Gauteng Manufacturing SME Hub. Includes mentorship, market access support, and financial linkage.

Name: GMSH ISO 9001:2015 QMS Internal Auditor Certification – 6 Staff
Description: SANAS-accredited ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System internal auditor certification for 6 GMSH staff. Certified by IRCA-registered lead auditor at LRQA South Africa.

Name: GMSH Occupational Health & Safety Rep Training – 12 Staff
Description: OHS Act-compliant Health & Safety Representative training (16 hours) for 12 production staff. Accredited provider: NOSA (National Occupational Safety Association). Certification valid 3 years.

Name: GMSH Receivable – Dept. Basic Education R445,000 (Outstanding 60 days)
Description: Government receivable – Department of Basic Education school uniform supply, 3,200 learner sets. PO No. DBE-2025-GP-04512. Payment 60 days from delivery confirmation. PFMA-compliant procurement.

Name: GMSH Receivable – Gauteng Dept. of Health R218,500 (Outstanding 30 days)
Description: Government receivable – Gauteng Dept. of Health for supply of patient gowns and staff scrubs. PO No. GDOH-2025-0112. Certified compliant with SANS 1387. Net 30 days.

Name: GMSH Export Invoice #EXP-001 – Zambia Retail Chain K198,000
Description: Export invoice for cleaning product range exported to Zambia retail chain (Shoprite Zambia). SARS export declaration submitted. SADC Certificate of Origin issued. Invoice in ZAR equivalent.

Name: GMSH Trade Invoice #2025-010 – Nampak Ltd R312,000
Description: Supply of 180,000 units of custom-printed flexible packaging to Nampak Ltd – Packaging Division. BRC/IFS Food Safety Certified. Net 30 days.
